name: Telegram

composio_registry_match.name: Telegram
composio_registry_match.description: Telegram is a cloud-based messaging app with a focus on security and speed. Build bots to send messages, manage chats, and interact with users.

description: A cloud-based messaging platform providing APIs for building bots, customized clients, and integrated web applications.
notes: Telegram Bot API uses token-based API keys generated via @BotFather. While MTProto is their primary protocol, the Bot API is a simplified HTTPS REST-like interface perfect for agent toolkits. [human-verified: Auth is Bot Token via @BotFather not API key. Instant creation. Fully free.]
